name: Chocolate Mint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
COOKIES:
1. In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a large bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in the vanilla extract and egg until well combined.
3. Gradually stir in the flour mixture into the butter mixture until just incorporated.
4. Stir in the mint chocolate chips.
5. Cover and refrigerate the dough for at least 1 hour.
GLAZE:
1. In a large heatproof bowl, melt the remaining mint chocolate chips with the vegetable shortening over hot (not boiling) water, stirring until smooth.
2. Remove from heat but keep warm.
3. Dip half of each cookie into the glaze, allowing excess to drip off.
4. Place cookies on wax paper-lined cookie sheets. Allow the glaze to set for about 10 minutes before serving.
+++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
NOTE:
This recipe yields approximately 24 cookies. Store leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature or refrigerate for up to 3 days.
